import pytest
from source import find_first_in_sorted

@pytest.mark.timeout(1)
def test_find_first_in_sorted_with_duplicates():
    arr = [3, 4, 5, 5, 5, 6]
    result = find_first_in_sorted(arr, 5)
    assert result == 2, f"Expected first index 2, got {result}"

import pytest
from source import find_first_in_sorted

def test_find_first_not_found_returns_minus_one():
    arr = [1, 2, 3]
    target = 4  # target is greater than any element in the array
    assert find_first_in_sorted(arr, target) == -1, (
        f"Expected -1 when target {target} is not present in {arr}"
    )
